refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Maintain network infrastructure reliability to support link availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network communication paths.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and automatic failover.
DP3: Employ robust error correction and data retransmission protocols.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and automatic failover.

potential_sources: Interaction with safety alert systems for failure notification
coupling_check.notes: DP2 logically isolates link monitoring and failover mechanisms, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network infrastructure supports failover capabilities.
Risk of delayed failover impacting link availability.
High safety criticality requires rigorous failover validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating error correction protocols if failover alone does not meet availability targets.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation link management, including monitoring and failover control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send link status and health data to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Interface to notify Safety Services of link failures or degraded availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but link availability logic is diffused; poor containment for this DP.
Vehicle module has limited direct control over teleoperation link; low containment.
High containment and low diffusion; best candidate for implementing link availability DP.
Receives alerts but does not control link availability; moderate containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP2 to Teleoperation module centralizes link availability logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Safety Services for alerting.
Dependency on Network Link interface reliability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface contracts and robust error handling on Network Link and SafetyAlert interfaces.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (real-time monitoring and failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and is verifiable.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is well contained within Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows high containment score and low diffusion, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and safety alert logs from the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface specifications between Teleoperation and Safety Services for alert handling.
Plan for integration testing of failover mechanisms under realistic network conditions.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the requirements with acceptable containment and verifiability. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Maintain network infrastructure reliability to support link availability.

revise.why: Current artifacts meet criteria; further refinement will proceed in next decomposition level.

evidence_needed: Safety alert logs during link failures.
